evals.prompt: I need a settings page with a form that has name, email, a role select dropdown, and a notifications toggle switch. Use React Hook Form with Zod validation. The name should be required and at least 2 chars, email must be valid.
evals.expected_output: A complete React component with Zod schema, useForm, FormField wrappers for each input type, proper Select and Switch integration

assertions.text: All shadcn imports are from @/components/ui/ (not from @base-ui/react directly)
Zod schema validates name with min(2)
Uses FormField component wrappers for inputs
Select uses onValueChange and defaultValue for form integration
Switch uses checked and onCheckedChange for form integration

evals.prompt: I want to add a new 'warning' variant to my Button component and also create a confirmation dialog that uses it. The warning button should be yellow/amber themed.
evals.expected_output: Modified button.tsx with warning variant added to CVA, and a confirmation dialog component using the warning button

assertions.text: Button uses CVA with a 'warning' variant defined
Warning variant uses yellow or amber Tailwind CSS classes
Uses cn() utility for class merging
Dialog uses AlertDialog or Dialog components from @/components/ui/
Uses render prop instead of asChild (Base UI pattern)

evals.prompt: I need a mobile-friendly menu using a Drawer component, and when the user selects an action from the drawer, show a toast notification using Sonner confirming what they did.
evals.expected_output: A Drawer component with menu items and Sonner toast integration for action confirmations

assertions.text: Uses toast() from sonner for notifications
Toast is called when a menu item/action is selected
All shadcn imports are from @/components/ui/ (not from @base-ui/react directly)
